overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a coastal beach at dusk in a video game environment (GTA V style), featuring wooden stilt houses on a hillside, a distant coastal pier, and gentle ocean waves under a colorful pink and orange sunset sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beach with wooden stilt houses on hillside

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy beach with wooden stilt houses visible on the hillside to the right, brief hand gesture visible at the very beginning

entered.detail: multi-story wooden beach house on stilts with balcony, situated on rocky hillside
wet compacted sand along the shoreline
calm ocean with gentle waves reflecting sunset colors
dense green trees and shrubs covering the coastal hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view on a coastal beach at dusk, featuring distinctive wooden stilt houses perched on a vegetated hillside to the right. The camera moves smoothly along the sandy shore with calm ocean waters to the left, under a pink and orange sunset sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach shoreline with distant pier

events.description: coastal pier becomes visible on the horizon in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the open beach as the shoreline curves, with the wooden houses receding and the ocean expanse dominating the left side

entered.detail: long wooden pier extending into the ocean with structure at the end, visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the built-up hillside area, the beach opens up into a wide shoreline with sparse vegetation. The wooden stilt houses pass out of view behind the camera as a distant coastal pier becomes visible on the horizon, marking the destination ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach approaching pier with rocky outcrops

events.description: rocky outcrops appear scattered along the shoreline near the water

agents.ego_description: walking toward the increasingly prominent pier as rocky formations begin to appear along the water's edge

entered.detail: large dark boulders and rocks scattered along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The pier grows larger in the frame as the camera approaches along the beach. Rocky outcrops begin to appear along the shoreline, adding texture to the sandy beach. The sunset colors deepen as the camera moves closer to the pier structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach shoreline with pier very close, shallow water and rocks

events.description: camera moves through shallow water along the shoreline

agents.ego_description: approaching the pier structure while walking through shallow waves and navigating around rocky areas on the beach

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera moves through shallow ocean water along the shoreline, approaching very close to the pier structure. The rocky outcrops are now prominent in the foreground, and the detailed wooden structure of the pier becomes clearly visible against the colorful dusk sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a coastal beach that transitions from a hillside settlement toward a distant pier under a deepening sunset. It begins by moving smoothly along the sandy shore with wooden stilt houses perched on a vegetated hillside to the right and calm ocean waters to the left. As the camera moves away from the hillside, the beach opens into a wide shoreline where the houses fade from view and a distant pier emerges on the horizon. The scene then shifts as rocky outcrops begin to appear along the coast and the sunset colors intensify while the pier grows larger in the frame. Finally, the camera glides through shallow ocean water, passing prominent foreground rocks to reach the detailed wooden structure of the pier against the colorful dusk sky.
